query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: A composition in monochrome tones showing two horizontal arrows pointing inward toward a central vertical rectangular block, with reversed numerals and punctuation marks arranged along the lower portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred and grainy monochrome photograph with a faded, washed-out palette, oppressively low contrast, and crushed blacks. Two indistinct arrows converge on a soft central block amid dense analog film artifacts, while reversed numerals and symbols along the lower edge dissolve into a murky, detail-starved background, yielding an abstract and atmospherically distressed composition.
